questionHtml: State the unit for the quantity represented by the gradient in your answer to (b)(i).
markschemeHtml:
kJ kg−1 K−2

 

Accept J instead of kJ

Accept °C–2 instead of K−2

Accept °C–1 K–1 instead of K−2

Accept C for °C

meta.title: State the unit for the quantity represented by the gradient in your answer to (b)(i).
